hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB document checks into a controlled workflow that preserves audit evidence and supports repeatable compliance review for digital asset onboarding.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule

problem_title: Onboarding slows with disconnected document checks
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain a consistent and traceable review process when KYC and KYB document verifications remain siloed across multiple providers. This fragmentation increases manual effort, delays customer onboarding, and weakens audit readiness for regulatory review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates fragmented document verification outputs into one structured onboarding workflow, enabling compliance teams to manage reviews, decisions and audit evidence with consistent traceability and reduced manual effort.
workflow_title: From document checks to onboarding approval
workflow_description: SFTY structures document verification outputs into risk-based reviews, case creation, decision logs and audit evidence to support compliant onboarding approvals.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond isolated checks. One review-ready workflow
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects scattered document verification outputs into structured review workflows, cases, decisions and audit evidence without replacing existing KYC or KYB providers.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled document verification workflows that preserve audit evidence and enable secure, governed deployment for bank and regulatory due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support structured document review workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how document verification fits into onboarding cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence is preserved during document reviews

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP onboarding compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance layer that connects KYC, KYB, sanctions and risk data into structured onboarding workflows for VASPs, enabling auditable and consistent customer due diligence.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure document verification workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY turns document verification results into repeatable workflows by applying internal policies, routing reviews based on risk, opening cases, and capturing reviewer decisions and evidence systematically.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding evidence by storing decision logs, document review records, case history and supporting data to provide a clear audit trail for compliance and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYC and KYB providers, orchestrating their outputs into a single workflow layer without disrupting existing systems or provider relationships.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace document verification providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace document verification providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, preserving their data while supporting compliance review and reporting.
final_description: See how SFTY connects KYC and KYB document checks into controlled cases with audit evidence for repeatable onboarding compliance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
